Notice Of Motion And Plaintiff Stewarts Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Production Of Documents From Defendant Able Engineering, Inc.; And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant And Or Its Counsel
Off Calendar Jul-02-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Anne Costin, of Costin Law Inc., Tel. 415. 977.0400, for plaintiffs;
Charles L. Thompson IV, of Ogletree Deakins, Nash, Smoak & Stewart, P.C., Tel. 415.442.4810, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court modifies its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF DONALD STEWART'S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Production Of Documents From Defendant Able Engineering, Inc. is GRANTED. The request for sanctions is granted for $3810. Order signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Plaintiff Stewarts Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Production Of Documents From Defendant Able Engineering, Inc.; And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant And Or Its Counsel
Off Calendar Jun-17-2015 Continued To Jul-02-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Anne Constin of Costin Law Inc. telephone number 415-977-0400 for Plaintiff.
Charles Thompson of Ogletree, Deekins, Nash, Smoak & Stewart, P.C. telephone number 415-828-2903 for Defendant.

Counsel for the Plaintiff did not stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. The Court did not adopt the tentative ruling. Plaintiff Donald Stewart's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Production Of Documents From Defendant Able Engineering, Inc.; And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant And Or Its Counsel is continued to July 2, 2015 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
